decoder_heading: Privacy Policy
ident_heading: PRIVACY POLICY
heading_content_part: PRIVACY POLICYPRIVACY POLICYThis privacy policy describes what kind of data kirici collects and receives. "Personal information" should be considered as personally identifiable data that is not publicly available, including things such as name or email address. The following terms apply to all products, software, services and websites facilitated by kirici:

decoder_heading: Collected Information
ident_heading: Collected information
heading_content_part: Collected information

decoder_heading: Kirici may receive any information you agree to share with us
ident_heading: Kirici may receive any information you agree to share with us
heading_content_part: Kirici may receive any information you agree to share with us, i.e. name, location, or sex, but only when the choice exists and is clearly presented by the application.

decoder_heading: Kirici automatically receives and may record information from your web browser
ident_heading: Kirici automatically receives and may record information from your web browser
heading_content_part: Kirici automatically receives and may record information from your web browser after you access our webpages, including your IP address and your URL of choice. Also,

decoder_heading: Kirici's applications can gather device identification data
ident_heading: kirici's applications can gather device identification data
heading_content_part: kirici's applications can gather device identification data, such as your device ID, IMEI number, etc.

decoder_heading: Information Usage
ident_heading: Information usage
heading_content_part: Information usage

decoder_heading: Kirici uses information only for general purposes
ident_heading: Kirici uses information only for general purposes
heading_content_part: Kirici uses information only for general purposes, such as customization of advertising and content, improvement of services, collect app crashs, and research.

decoder_heading: Information Sharing
ident_heading: Information sharing
heading_content_part: Information sharing

decoder_heading: Kirici does not rent, sell, or share personal information
ident_heading: Kirici does not rent, sell, or share personal information
heading_content_part: Kirici does not rent, sell, or share personal information about you with other people or nonaffiliated companies except to provide products or services you've requested, when we have your permission.

decoder_heading: We can share the information to our partners who work with us
ident_heading: We can share the information to our partners who work with us
heading_content_part: We can share the information to our partners who work with us. These companies may use information to help us communicate offers, but they don't have any rights to share this information.

ident_heading: Statistics

decoder_heading: Kirici gathers statistics about our applications usage behaviour
ident_heading: Kirici gathers statistics about our applications usage behaviour
heading_content_part: Kirici gathers statistics about our applications usage behaviour. Kirici uses this information to improve the customer experience, as well as customize

decoder_heading: Advertising
ident_heading: advertising
heading_content_part: advertising and content. This data does not include personal information or any other information from your device or computer that is unrelated to the application. Apps uses Google Analytics to gather traffic information and demographics. The Google Analytics privacy policy is available at www.google.com/intl/en/analytics/privacyoverview.html .Advertising

decoder_heading: TERMS OF USE
ident_heading: TERMS OF USE
heading_content_part: TERMS OF USEBy installing an Application, you agree to the following rules:

decoder_heading: We make effort to provide a reliable access to our applications
ident_heading: We make effort to provide a reliable access to our applications
heading_content_part: We make effort to provide a reliable access to our applications, however outages and unexpected downtime may occur.

decoder_heading: Kirici does not make any guarantees of uninterrupted or continued service
ident_heading: Kirici does not make any guarantees of uninterrupted or continued service
heading_content_part: Kirici does not make any guarantees of uninterrupted or continued service. In particular, lost virtual currency and/or virtual goods may occur from time to time due to technical problems.

decoder_heading: Kirici is separated and is in no way affiliated with the companies that operate any existing or future advertising or payment providers
ident_heading: Kirici is separated and is in no way affiliated with the companies that operate any existing or future advertising or payment providers
heading_content_part: Kirici is separated and is in no way affiliated with the companies that operate any existing or future advertising or payment providers that may become integrated with the application, so is not responsible for actions they may or may not take regarding services they provide.

decoder_heading: Kirici makes no warranty or guarantees regarding the availability and continued use of these external services
ident_heading: Kirici makes no warranty or guarantees regarding the availability and continued use of these external services
heading_content_part: Kirici makes no warranty or guarantees regarding the availability and continued use of these external services. Any problems using these external services must be reported to them directly.

decoder_heading: Kirici is in no way responsible for any personal injury you may incurred through your use of the application
ident_heading: Kirici is in no way responsible for any personal injury you may incurred through your use of the application
heading_content_part: Kirici is in no way responsible for any personal injury you may incurred through your use of the application.
